gt_sql: SELECT t1.buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id ORDER BY t1.buildUpPlaySpeed ASC LIMIT 4
pred_sql: SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team_Attributes ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC LIMIT 4;
question: What are the speed in which attacks are put together of the top 4 teams with the highest build Up Play Speed?
